---
title: "Open Government Data, opendata.swiss"
date: "2026-02-22"
output: html_document
---

## Dataset: Ist-Daten v2

Die Ist-Daten enthalten die effektiv gefahrenen Fahrten des letzten bzw. des entsprechenden Tages. Die Ist-Daten sind entweder effektive Ist-Daten oder die letzte Prognose, die das Kundeninformationssystem erhalten hat. Wenn keine Echtzeitinformationen vorhanden waren, so fehlt die entsprechende Fahrt.

Dies ist die neue **Version 2** des Datensatzes:

- sie enthält auch Daten mit ausländischen Haltestellen (BPUIC nicht mit 85 beginnend) und für Haltestellen mit einer SLOID als BPIUC.

- das Feld BPUIC kann 7-stellig (herkömmliche Haltestellen-Code), 9-stellig (2 zusätzliche Stellen für Gleis/Haltekanten), oder eine SLOID (15+ Stellen) sein.

Die alte, erste Version ist diese: https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/istdaten

Ist-Daten Archiv: https://archive.opentransportdata.swiss/actual_data_archive.htm

[Direct link by **opendata.swiss** for dataset](https://opendata.swiss/de/dataset/ist-daten-v2)<br>
[Direct link by **Geschäftsstelle Systemaufgaben Kundeninformation (SBB AG)** for dataset](https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/ist-daten-v2)

Auto-generated R starter code for the dataset ist-daten-v2@oevch.

## Metadata

- **Publisher.name** `nan`
- **Organization.display_name.de** `Geschäftsstelle Systemaufgaben Kundeninformation (SBB AG)`
- **Organization.url** `https://www.opentransportdata.swiss`
- **Maintainer** `None`
- **Maintainer_email** `None`
- **Keywords.de** `['proprietar', 'embag', 'daten', 'prognose', 'verspatung', 'punktlichkeit', 'ist-daten', 'zug', 'bus', 'passagier']`
- **Issued** `2025-07-28T16:37:00`
- **Metadata_created** `2025-07-29T01:56:54.209194`
- **Metadata_modified** `2026-02-22T00:22:45.814582`


# Load packages

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)

```

# Load data

-   The dataset has 50 distribution(s) in CSV format.
-   All available CSV distributions are listed below and can be read into a tibble.

```{r}

# Distribution 0
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T04:11:42.116359
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T04:11:42.116359
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/329eed3e-f504-438b-97d7-c77e6cbd137f/download/2026-02-20_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 1
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-20T04:11:34.584417
# Modified                 : 2026-02-20T04:11:34.584417
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/980aad8d-f673-4720-a4da-0fdb17c69c83/download/2026-02-19_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 2
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-19T04:11:41.532010
# Modified                 : 2026-02-19T04:11:41.532010
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/ddc35bf5-1e17-4c35-940b-812b238b0dcc/download/2026-02-18_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 3
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-18T04:11:38.925476
# Modified                 : 2026-02-18T04:11:38.925476
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/d5aa3b0d-8b07-49ed-9db2-b583e4e1fe7a/download/2026-02-17_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 4
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-17T04:11:38.016385
# Modified                 : 2026-02-17T04:11:38.016385
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/d0ecdeb1-1f00-4055-982a-2fd5909f981b/download/2026-02-16_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 5
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-16T04:11:02.142419
# Modified                 : 2026-02-16T04:11:02.142419
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/7d8c025b-f0e2-4e0a-843c-259a52e56718/download/2026-02-15_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 6
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-15T04:11:18.574500
# Modified                 : 2026-02-15T04:11:18.574500
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/41eed910-f65a-4180-ac3d-3b4753706210/download/2026-02-14_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 7
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-14T04:11:40.265116
# Modified                 : 2026-02-14T04:11:40.265116
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/ca04b402-9710-4c78-ba2f-3cbbdf5c8ee7/download/2026-02-13_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 8
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-13T04:11:45.046214
# Modified                 : 2026-02-13T04:11:45.046214
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/bafe0048-d0b5-4897-b10b-7d47817d640f/download/2026-02-12_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 9
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-12T04:11:38.507716
# Modified                 : 2026-02-12T04:11:38.507716
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/a3dbc576-219e-4c47-a9f3-79321d546019/download/2026-02-11_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 10
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-11T06:55:15.033711
# Modified                 : 2026-02-11T06:55:15.033711
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/4b9c2115-80e4-4b44-8746-80022111d574/download/2026-02-10_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 11
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-10T04:11:39.114367
# Modified                 : 2026-02-10T04:11:39.114367
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/7abecdb1-8323-4c87-911c-963f498e8ac7/download/2026-02-09_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 12
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-09T04:11:01.542060
# Modified                 : 2026-02-09T04:11:01.542060
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/1cecb9ae-5abf-4ea0-b3f2-93cb84a54c99/download/2026-02-08_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 13
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-08T04:11:25.825348
# Modified                 : 2026-02-08T04:11:25.825348
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/c639f5dd-211e-449a-95e7-2bcd9ea702b0/download/2026-02-07_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 14
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-07T04:11:43.766774
# Modified                 : 2026-02-07T04:11:43.766774
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/588ac179-c57c-4037-87a7-9ebd15d92a53/download/2026-02-06_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 15
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-06T04:11:37.746574
# Modified                 : 2026-02-06T04:11:37.746574
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/6a52e9b1-04e5-4595-863a-a6a66576d56d/download/2026-02-05_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 16
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-05T04:11:41.704376
# Modified                 : 2026-02-05T04:11:41.704376
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/4ca48749-897d-4d96-9356-21a3349b5db4/download/2026-02-04_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 17
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-04T04:11:42.833093
# Modified                 : 2026-02-04T04:11:42.833093
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/db6d576c-b71e-4697-b4dc-1d3135df9d14/download/2026-02-03_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 18
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-03T04:11:44.691791
# Modified                 : 2026-02-03T04:11:44.691791
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/2d0a9aa4-6ca9-41fe-bf08-bfbab6cdfa80/download/2026-02-02_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 19
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-02T04:11:06.122057
# Modified                 : 2026-02-02T04:11:06.122057
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/6dda0165-c729-47b7-8012-a717eed571ce/download/2026-02-01_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 20
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-01T04:11:24.855041
# Modified                 : 2026-02-01T04:11:24.855041
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/dc43d0a4-9bc6-4381-a09e-123d35c0cc25/download/2026-01-31_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 21
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-31T04:11:43.465913
# Modified                 : 2026-01-31T04:11:43.465913
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/3e331410-4da1-4cd6-97d6-c8678f44dd81/download/2026-01-30_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 22
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-30T04:11:41.475152
# Modified                 : 2026-01-30T04:11:41.475152
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/57056098-90d5-4d15-ae27-0b41e5f8da2c/download/2026-01-29_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 23
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-29T04:11:38.842216
# Modified                 : 2026-01-29T04:11:38.842216
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/f3869637-bcf1-42a8-a518-6d69fc1b52e0/download/2026-01-28_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 24
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-28T04:11:39.870551
# Modified                 : 2026-01-28T04:11:39.870551
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/d6f995ab-f231-434d-8811-463a82d92d18/download/2026-01-27_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 25
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-27T04:11:41.080659
# Modified                 : 2026-01-27T04:11:41.080659
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/4ff423b3-acff-43f9-bef5-49e4ecc0d85c/download/2026-01-26_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 26
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-26T04:11:02.824466
# Modified                 : 2026-01-26T04:11:02.824466
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/42811fa3-7a0d-416f-ad65-df62a418a7dd/download/2026-01-25_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 27
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-25T04:11:25.070067
# Modified                 : 2026-01-25T04:11:25.070067
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/9adf1208-a492-4352-a168-90d9a0688211/download/2026-01-24_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 28
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-24T04:11:44.890697
# Modified                 : 2026-01-24T04:11:44.890697
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/575a1000-270f-4703-a65f-3a51ef7c7e12/download/2026-01-23_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 29
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-23T04:11:41.280869
# Modified                 : 2026-01-23T04:11:41.280869
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/23118c1e-b228-45ed-818e-edf0c62b72c2/download/2026-01-22_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 30
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-22T04:11:43.196253
# Modified                 : 2026-01-22T04:11:43.196253
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/a4db7a1f-07dd-4d36-b576-65a9eda2cb74/download/2026-01-21_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 31
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-21T04:11:41.950989
# Modified                 : 2026-01-21T04:11:41.950989
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/85af360d-b4f7-4ca8-ae0c-21a68d5b93c3/download/2026-01-20_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 32
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-20T04:11:39.844228
# Modified                 : 2026-01-20T04:11:39.844228
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/6b13afb3-9fd8-4fb8-96f4-54bafb6c6575/download/2026-01-19_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 33
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-19T04:11:02.477243
# Modified                 : 2026-01-19T04:11:02.477243
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/90d00b88-4cbc-44ee-a8d6-b828d38dedd5/download/2026-01-18_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 34
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-18T04:11:26.184111
# Modified                 : 2026-01-18T04:11:26.184111
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/bd53c025-72d9-4e48-a2b6-9f293d1125f3/download/2026-01-17_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 35
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-17T04:11:44.392190
# Modified                 : 2026-01-17T04:11:44.392190
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/3bd87dae-8d5a-4bbd-8c16-62b1aba70fce/download/2026-01-16_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 36
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-16T04:11:41.895004
# Modified                 : 2026-01-16T04:11:41.895004
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/d0068fdc-349c-455d-b77c-b91645883009/download/2026-01-15_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 37
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-15T04:11:42.182219
# Modified                 : 2026-01-15T04:11:42.182219
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/7977f234-8ced-4034-9738-8c5ff8d92d16/download/2026-01-14_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 38
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-14T04:11:35.293743
# Modified                 : 2026-01-14T04:11:35.293743
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/60b4e043-a23a-4a5f-a834-966610c749de/download/2026-01-13_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 39
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-13T04:11:32.865162
# Modified                 : 2026-01-13T04:11:32.865162
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/fe9f4ad1-f969-41c7-b6c8-785f78e390b5/download/2026-01-12_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 40
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-12T04:11:00.888421
# Modified                 : 2026-01-12T04:11:00.888421
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/437e7180-5253-4e1c-9fdb-db74470b49c4/download/2026-01-11_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 41
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-11T04:11:23.551748
# Modified                 : 2026-01-11T04:11:23.551748
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/fc4f76ed-964c-4631-85c2-71f3ea43fb42/download/2026-01-10_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 42
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-10T04:11:48.760902
# Modified                 : 2026-01-10T04:11:48.760902
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/dee20f9a-7ffd-408b-aed2-43f895d79287/download/2026-01-09_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 43
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-09T04:11:36.555436
# Modified                 : 2026-01-09T04:11:36.555436
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/a7bc4e22-5566-4d4c-944d-65b5f9d533dd/download/2026-01-08_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 44
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-08T04:11:44.262493
# Modified                 : 2026-01-08T04:11:44.262493
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/82b299e5-e236-439b-b669-bae3902fd3cd/download/2026-01-07_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 45
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-07T04:11:44.649619
# Modified                 : 2026-01-07T04:11:44.649619
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/8c5995df-11fc-43cd-988d-5ea59706c1bf/download/2026-01-06_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 46
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-06T04:11:43.570557
# Modified                 : 2026-01-06T04:11:43.570557
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/05bd28f2-c99b-47a8-bb72-8dfd937bef62/download/2026-01-05_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 47
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-05T04:11:03.416466
# Modified                 : 2026-01-05T04:11:03.416466
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/cf3a4590-7931-4cfe-8aba-c1a1e70788d6/download/2026-01-04_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 48
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-04T04:11:27.780308
# Modified                 : 2026-01-04T04:11:27.780308
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/91937901-595e-48a4-8411-fde6cb58e460/download/2026-01-03_istdaten.csv')

# Distribution 49
# Package_id               : 7a8a1a84-ce51-42aa-8507-120cda5c648a
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-01-03T04:11:14.754434
# Modified                 : 2026-01-03T04:11:14.754434
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/febff1f3-ee85-470a-9487-2d07f93457c1/resource/5d49fdf3-916e-4978-8107-ed8804319772/download/2026-01-02_istdaten.csv')



```

# Analyze data

```{r}

glimpse(df)
str(df)
skim(df)

head(df)
tail(df)

```

# Continue your code here...

```{r}

```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Contact

opendata@sbb.ch | Open Data Mobilität Schweiz
